name: Nathan Macintosh
blurb: He won the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-Up Newcomer in 2009 and made his American late-night debut on Conan in 2017.
bio: Nathan Macintosh is a Canadian stand-up comedian from Halifax, Nova Scotia, known for high-energy, ranting material about technology, money, and modern life. He won the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-Up Newcomer in 2009 and made his American late-night debut on Conan in 2017. His self-released special Money Never Wakes and his album Down with Tech drew critical praise, the latter earning a Juno Award nomination.

timeline.ev: Wins the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-Up Newcomer
Makes his American late-night debut on Conan
Performs on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
Special Money Never Wakes praised by The New York Times
Album Down with Tech earns a Juno Award nomination

accolades: Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-Up Newcomer, 2009
Juno Award nomination for the album Down with Tech
Money Never Wakes named a best YouTube special by The New York Times
